user.title: Connect ZeroClaw gateway
user.description: Use your ZeroClaw HTTP gateway webhook ({base_url}/webhook). Pair the gateway first if it requires authentication.

data.bearer_token: Bearer token (optional if pairing is disabled)

abort.already_configured: Already configured. Only one instance is supported.

error.invalid_url: Enter a valid URL including host (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8585)
